name: Cream of Artichoke Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onions and rosemary to the pot. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the onions are translucent.
3. Add the Jerusalem artichokes and water to the pot. Stir to combine.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
5. Reduce the heat to low and cover the pot. Simmer for 30 minutes, or until the artichokes are tender.
6. Remove the pot from the heat and let it cool slightly.
7. Use an immersion blender to blend the soup into a smooth consistency. If you don't have an immersion blender, you can transfer the soup to a regular blender or food processor in batches.
8. Add the crushed garlic, oatmeal, soy sauce, and salt to the blended soup. Stir to combine.
9. Return the pot to low heat if needed to warm through before serving.
